docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Title
docs.text:
This is the title. And the page no is 2.

Apple, banana, cherry.

docs.title: Some code block
docs.text:
This is dart code.

sample_action.dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

/// Upload profile photo action
Future uploadProfilePhotoAction(BuildContext context) async {
  await action_blocks.uploadProfilePhotoAction(context);
}

List<int> abc = [1,2,3];
print(abc);
